content.en:
Outside the Void Zone.

The Silent Sea is gone, and it's empty.

The Eternal Controllers of the Void Region were shocked when they saw that such a huge Black Silent Sea was swallowed by Ye Tian, this was a Black Silent Sea that even they couldn't help it, and it was actually solved by Ye Tian, the half-step Eternal Master.

Such a secret technique is so amazing that it breaks their cognition.

After Ye Tian devoured the Black Silent Sea, he was realizing the benefits he had gained after devouring the Black Silent Sea.

The Life Eater allowed him to devour the Black Silent Sea, and also gained some of the Black Silent Sea's abilities.

For example, his life level will gradually increase to a level close to that of the Black Silent Sea, and his strength will be as endless as his Black Silent Sea, and the endless years of fighting will not exhaust his strength.

In addition, he can neutralize enemy attacks.

Just like the Black Silent Sea, the reason why it is difficult to be erased by the Eternal Master is because the attack of the Eternal Master falls in the Black Silent Sea, which will be neutralized, plus the energy of the Black Silent Sea will be erased, and the Black Silent Sea will recover quickly.

This caused the Eternal Master to attack the Silent Sea for countless years, and was unable to kill the Silent Sea.

And although Ye Tian has not yet completely digested the ability to inherit the Black Silent Sea, once he has completely digested it, he will stand there and let the ordinary Eternal Controller kill him, and the Eternal Controller will not be able to kill him.

"The Life Swallowing Technique is terrifying!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian tried his best to digest the Black Silent Sea.

After all, now the Black Silent Sea has only been absorbed into his body, and he has to slowly refine it, and this is still a long process.

In the following days, Ye Tian went all out to refine the Black Silent Sea.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, sixty thousand realm river years had passed.

It was well worth spending such a long time refining the Black Silent Sea.

Now, Ye Tian had completely refined the Black Silent Sea, and his life level had risen to a level even higher than that of a normal Eternal Master.

His physical body is dozens of times stronger than before, you must know that his own physical body is already comparable to the Eternal Master, and now it is dozens of times stronger, what a terrifying improvement!

In addition, his will has been raised again.

Originally, his will had been raised to the peak realm of the eighth order, but now in the absorption and refining of the Black Silence Sea, he had also increased his will power, which was enough to raise his will power to the eighth order extreme.

In other words, once he breaks through to the realm of the Eternal Master, he has the hope of raising his will to the ninth level.

Right now, Ye Tian's life level has been raised to the extreme, and his strength has also been raised to the extreme, and it is almost impossible to advance.

"It's time to storm the realm of the Eternal Master. "

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Void Zone.

Ye Tian dismantled all the other replica bodies, leaving only this duplicated body as the main body to break through.

Because he knew that once he hit the realm of the Eternal Master, if the other copied bodies were not lifted, they would also fall into the situation of breaking through the Eternal Master.

Rather than this, it is better to let this body break through wholeheartedly.

Anyway, he was 100% sure that he would make a breakthrough.

It stands to reason that Wanyuan Mountain is the safest place, but after all, he is an eternal realm life, and breaking through in the eternal realm is the best choice, and the success rate is also the highest.

Source Sea.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to make a breakthrough here.

Before breaking through, he also told the white-bearded old man that there was an old man with a white beard to protect the Dharma for him.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the intersection of the Long River of Time and the Sea of Kong, sat cross-legged here, and began to choose to break through to the realm of the Eternal Master.

Soon, Ye Tian transcended the limitations of time and space and crossed the realm of the underworld.

The next moment, he was in a space-time area, and the dense threads of space-time locked him.

He had to break free from these threads of time and space before he could completely break the shackles and ascend to the realm of the Eternal Master.

"Broken!"

One by one, the space-time lines were broken under Ye Tian's control.

He controlled three thousand Dao, controlled ten percent of the supreme legendary body, condensed the supreme control body, and also created his own life devouring technique, devouring the Black Silent Sea, and his physical body surpassed the eternal master.

With such a background, if he can't break through, who else can?

Collapse! Collapse!

One by one, the space-time lines are broken, and the speed of breaking is too fast.

At the beginning, the white-bearded old man broke through very reluctantly, but Ye Tian's breakthrough was too easy.

In a short time, the space-time line here broke to the point that there were only two left.

One represents time and one represents space.

Collapse!

Collapse!

The two silk threads broke at the same time, and all the space-time lines were broken.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, the space-time origin energy from the outside world continued to pour into his body, and the movement was too great.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the peak Legendary Realm lords were attracted by the movement here in the Source Sea, and they all guessed that Ye Tian had broken through to the Eternal Controller Realm.

"The Endless Lord has actually broken through to the realm of the Eternal Master, compared to him, I am too far behind!"

The Frontier Lord muttered.

Although he has now also broken through to the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, he is relatively weak among the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, although he is also qualified to attack the Eternal Master.

But he knew very well that if he really attacked, he would definitely die!

Rumble!!!!

An eternal master appeared, dressed in a long green dress, a peerless beauty.

Seeing this, several peak Legendary Realm Lords of the Blue Lotus Holy Land immediately said respectfully, "Blue Lotus Holy Lord!"

Being called the Holy Lord of the Blue Lotus by the people of the Blue Lotus Holy Land, his identity is self-evident.

The Eternal Master, the Qinglian Master.

"Meet the Blue Lotus Master!"

One by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lord said respectfully.

In the next moment, another Eternal Master appeared.

Master of the Stygian Sea!

One after another Eternal Masters appeared, and they all came to the Source Sea.

When Ye Tian walked out of the intersection of time and space, these eternal controllers saw the surging energy on Ye Tian's body, and they were immediately shocked.

They knew that Ye Tian's strength far surpassed him, reaching a level that they would find difficult to reach in their lifetime.

"Congratulations to the Infinite Master!"

"Congratulations to the Infinite Master!"

"Congratulations to the Infinite Master!"

The Eternal Masters congratulated in unison.

At this moment, those onlookers were dumbfounded.

What kind of row is this, when the white-bearded old man broke through to the Eternal Master, there was no Eternal Master to congratulate, but now that Ye Tian has broken through, there are so many Eternal Controllers.

What this means, they have some understanding.

That's Ye Tian, I'm afraid it's even more powerful than the white-bearded old man.

Airplanes!

Another Eternal Master has appeared, the Silver Demon Master.

He glanced at Ye Tian and was immediately terrified, he seemed to feel that Ye Tian at this time could pinch him to death casually.

"Infinite Master, I'm sorry, I was reckless before! "

The Silver Demon Controller presented a great gift, and this great gift was worth enough to make him feel painful.

However, in order to ease the relationship with Ye Tian, he had to do this.

And in the distance, those peak Legendary Realm lords were simply dumbfounded.
